technical_seo.heading: Who Technical SEO Is For
technical_seo.subtitle: This service is ideal if:
items: Rankings have plateaued or declined
Traffic is inconsistent or volatile
Your site is slow or bloated
You are running a large or complex website
You are planning a rebuild or migration
Previous SEO work focused only on content and links

local_seo.heading: Who Local SEO Is For
local_seo.subtitle: This service is ideal if:
items: You rely on local customers or service areas
You are not showing in Google Maps consistently
Competitors dominate local results
You have multiple locations or expansion plans
Your website traffic exists but calls do not

seo_audit.heading: Who This SEO Audit Is For
seo_audit.subtitle: This service is ideal if:
items: Rankings have stalled or declined
Traffic exists but conversions are weak
You are planning a redesign or migration
You want to scale SEO but lack clarity
You suspect technical or structural issues
You want an honest second opinion

on_page_seo.heading: Who This Service Is For
on_page_seo.subtitle: On-page SEO is ideal if:
items: Pages rank but do not convert
Rankings have stalled despite content output
You suspect keyword cannibalisation
Content feels bloated or unfocused
You want predictable SEO growth

off_page_seo.heading: Who This Is For
off_page_seo.subtitle: This service is ideal if:
items: You already have strong technical SEO
You have optimised on-page foundations
Competitors outrank you on authority
You want sustainable ranking growth
You care about long-term domain health

e_commerce_seo.heading: Who This Service Is For
e_commerce_seo.subtitle: E-commerce SEO is ideal if:
items: Products are not ranking despite demand
Category pages underperform
Organic traffic does not convert
The store suffers from crawl or duplication issues
You want scalable, predictable growth

link_building.heading: Who This Service Is For
link_building.subtitle: Link building is ideal if:
items: Rankings are stuck despite good on-page SEO
Competitors outrank you with weaker content
Domain authority is holding growth back
You want safe, scalable authority building
You need links that actually move rankings

seo_migration.heading: Who This Service Is For
seo_migration.subtitle: SEO migration is critical if you are:
items: Redesigning a high-traffic website
Changing CMS or platform
Moving domains or merging sites
Re-structuring URLs or navigation
Expanding internationally
Protecting revenue from organic search
